message:
Migrate asupersync dependency to canonical repo and clippy cleanup

Source migration: asupersync dependency now pulls from its own
repository (asupersync.git) at pinned rev 22505d8 instead of being
resolved transitively through the frankensearch workspace. Added
Cargo.toml [patch] section to redirect any frankensearch-sourced
asupersync references to the canonical repo, preventing resolution
inconsistencies on remote compilation workers.

Clippy fixes across 13 source files:
- Inline format string arguments (format!("...{}", e) → format!("...{e}"))
  throughout daemon/core.rs, daemon/worker.rs, main.rs, storage.rs
- Allow struct_excessive_bools on IndexArgs (cli.rs)
- Allow too_many_lines on handle_request (daemon/core.rs)
- Replace struct field mutation with struct literal init using
  ..Default for TwoTierConfig→FrankensearchTwoTierConfig conversion
- Relax float comparison epsilon from f64::EPSILON to 1e-6 in config
  test to account for f32→f64 widening precision loss
- Minor format macro consolidation in embedder modules

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -199,7 +199,7 @@ dependencies = [
 [[package]]
 name = "asupersync"
 version = "0.2.0"

+source = "git+https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync.git?rev=22505d891736f59098607aaeb4a55149208f7b70#22505d891736f59098607aaeb4a55149208f7b70"

  "base64 0.22.1",

@@ -121,7 +121,7 @@ impl FrankensearchReranker for FrankensearchRerankerAdapter {

                 .iter()
